```python
def headlessCompress(in_: List[int], inpos: int, inlength: int, out: List[int], outpos: int) -> Tuple[int, int]:
    i_outpos = outpos
    finalin = inpos + inlength
    while i_inpos < finalin:
        inoffset = compressblock(out, i_outpos, in_, i_inpos, inlength)
        if inoffset == -1:
            raise Exception("Too big a number")
        i_inpos += inoffset
        inlength -= inoffset
    return (i_inpos, i_outpos)
```
